name: Cherimoya-Orange Parfait
recipeInstructions:
1. For this recipe you will need 3 cherimoyas.
2. Combine whipping cream and sour cream in a deep bowl and refrigerate with beaters until well chilled.
3. Beat creams until frothy; gradually add sugar, vanilla, fruit juices, and salt.
4. Beat until quite stiff. Blend in cherimoya puree and 1 teaspoon orange peel.
5. Put half the cherimoya chunks in the bottom of 4 to 6 parfait glasses.
6. Spoon in a layer of cream, all the orange sections, a second layer of cream, and the remaining cherimoya.
7. Top with a dollop of cream and garnish with remaining orange peel and mint leaves.
8. Serves 4 to 6.
Source: Chicago Sun Times, March 20, 1986
